revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-3-480

Any protective covering applied to a surface.


Note: The term protective coating refers to a coating applied to give protection from the effects of weather, etc...

{{IALAFooter}}
